purpose: Confirmed official institution homepages only. This file is stage 1. Do not store event listings, event detail URLs, tickets pages, or third-party aggregators here.

policy.allow: confirmed institution official homepage or official subsite

institutions.name: Asian Civilisations Museum
evidence: User discovery output identified https://www.acm.nhb.gov.sg/ as official_site.
Domain uses ACM acronym under NHB Singapore domain.
Confirmed same-site ACM pages are under acm.nhb.gov.sg.

institutions.name: Mandai Wildlife Group
evidence: User confirmed Mandai Wildlife Reserve / Mandai Wildlife Group uses https://www.mandai.com/.
Singapore Zoo is a subsite under the same official Mandai domain, not a separate source.
Deduplicate by parent official domain mandai.com.

institutions.name: National Museum Singapore
evidence: User confirmed canonical official URL as https://www.nationalmuseum.nhb.gov.sg/.
Domain contains nationalmuseum and is under nhb.gov.sg.
Reject singapore-tickets.com and other third-party ticketing or tourism domains.

institutions.name: Gardens by the Bay
evidence: Official site navigation contains Things to do / Calendar of Events under gardensbythebay.com.sg.
Use only same-domain listing URLs in event_sources.json.

institutions.name: Esplanade
evidence: Official esplanade.com page exposes What's On and event filters.
Use only same-domain listing URLs in event_sources.json.

institutions.name: Science Centre Singapore
evidence: Official science.edu.sg site exposes What's On under the Explore navigation.
Use only same-domain listing URLs in event_sources.json.

institutions.name: The Kallang
evidence: sportshub.com.sg redirects to thekallang.com.sg for Events.
Official events page exposes Sport Events, Entertainment Events, Community Events and Lifestyle Events.

institutions.name: ArtScience Museum
evidence: Official Marina Bay Sands museum subsite exposes What's On, Exhibitions, Programmes and Experiences.
Use only the official Marina Bay Sands museum subsite, not ticket aggregators.
